name: Negombo Water Sports Park
description: Negombo Water Sports Park is a vibrant adventure hub in Gampaha, Western Province, offering thrilling activities like wakeboarding, kayaking, and scuba diving amidst picturesque waterways. Experience the thrill of adrenaline-pumping sports under the watchful eyes of experienced instructors.

name: Henarathgoda Canopy Walk
description: Discover the unique canopy walk at Henarathgoda, a thrilling adventure park nestled amidst lush greenery. Experience breathtaking views and zip through the treetops for a truly unforgettable journey.
activities: Zip Line Tour, Treetop Adventure, Bird Watching

name: Gampaha ATV Park
description: Experience the thrill of off-road adventures at Gampaha ATV Park, nestled amidst lush greenery and challenging terrain. This Western Province gem offers a unique blend of excitement and nature, perfect for adrenaline seekers and families alike.
activities: ATV Rides, Off-Road Tours, Skill Workshops

name: Kalu Ganga White Water Rafting
description: Kalu Ganga White Water Rafting is a thrilling adventure park located in Kalu Ganga, offering rafting trips through its picturesque white water rapids, perfect for adrenaline junkies seeking a heart-pounding experience amidst lush greenery and breathtaking views.

name: Kalutara Surf & Kayak
description: Kalutara Surf & Kayak offers a unique surf and kayak experience on the picturesque Kalu天涯海钓海滩. This adventure park, nestled in the heart of Kalutara, provides a perfect blend of water sports and natural beauty, making it a must-visit spot for both locals and tourists alike.

name: Beruwala Parasailing
description: Beruwala Parasailing offers breathtaking parasailing experiences over the crystal-clear waters of Kalu天涯海角. Experience the thrill of soaring through the air while taking in the stunning views of the Western Province coastline.
monsoon_note: May–Sep SW monsoon; Oct–Nov NE monsoon

name: Kandy Zipline & Canopy
description: Experience the thrill of Kandy Zipline & Canopy, where adrenaline-pumping ziplines soar through lush jungle canopy, offering breathtaking views and a unique adventure park experience in the heart of Kandy’s Central Province.
monsoon_note: Heavy rain May–Aug; mist at high elevations

name: Hanthana Trekking Centre
description: Hanthana Trekking Centre stands as a gem in Kandy’s adventure park, offering breathtaking views, challenging hikes, and a unique blend of nature and culture. Nestled amidst lush forests, it’s a perfect spot for those seeking a mix of physical challenge and cultural immersion.

name: Victoria Bungee
description: Victoria Bungee, nestled amidst lush greenery in Kandy’s Central Province, offers thrilling bungee jumping experiences that combine breathtaking views with adrenaline-pumping excitement. Experience the thrill of leaping off a cliff into the crystal-clear waters below, surrounded by nature's splendor.
activities: Bungee Jumping, Nature Walk, Cliff View

name: Knuckles Trekking Centre
description: The Knuckles Trekking Centre offers breathtaking views and challenging hikes through ancient tropical forests, perfect for nature enthusiasts seeking adventure and tranquility.

name: Dambulla Rock Climb
description: Experience the awe-inspiring Dambulla Rock Climb, a UNESCO World Heritage site perched on a cliff overlooking the Central Province. This ancient temple, carved into the rock face, offers breathtaking views and a glimpse into Sri Lanka's rich cultural heritage.

name: Rattota ATV Trail
description: Experience the thrill of riding ATVs through the lush green trails of Rattota, a hidden gem in Matale District. Nestled amidst the Central Province’s natural beauty, this ATV trail offers a perfect blend of adventure and relaxation. Ideal for both beginners and experienced riders, Rattota provides a safe and exciting environment for all.
monsoon_note: Heavy rain May–Aug; mist at high elevations

name: Nuwara Eliya Adventure Zone
description: Nuwara Eliya Adventure Zone offers thrilling zip-lining, rock climbing, and abseiling amidst lush tea plantations and dense forests. Experience the thrill of adventure in a picturesque setting that blends natural beauty with adrenaline-pumping activities.

name: Moon Plains Paragliding
description: Moon Plains Paragliding offers breathtaking paragliding experiences over lush green landscapes and misty valleys. Nestled in Nuwara Eliya, this adventure park provides thrilling rides for both beginners and experts, offering stunning views of the Central Province’s natural beauty.
monsoon_note: Heavy rain May–Aug; mist at high elevations

name: Horton Plains Hiking
description: Experience the breathtaking Horton Plains Hiking trail, a UNESCO Global Geopark site that offers panoramic views of the Central Province’s lush tea plantations and misty cloud forests. This iconic trek is perfect for nature lovers and adventure seekers, offering a glimpse into Sri Lanka’s natural heritage.

name: Galle Surf School
description: Galle Surf School offers a unique surfing experience on the picturesque beaches of Galle, perfect for both beginners and seasoned surfers. Nestled along the Southern coast, this school provides lessons and equipment rentals, making it a go-to spot for those seeking to catch some waves in a beautiful setting.
monsoon_note: May–Aug SW monsoon; A2 highway may flood

name: Jungle Beach Scuba
description: Jungle Beach Scuba offers a unique scuba diving experience at Jungle Beach, where visitors can explore vibrant coral reefs and encounter a variety of marine life. Nestled in Galle, this adventure park is perfect for both beginners and experienced divers, offering guided tours and equipment rentals.
monsoon_note: May–Aug SW monsoon; A2 highway may flood

name: Hikkaduwa Water Sports
description: Hikkaduwa Water Sports is a vibrant adventure park nestled along the pristine shores of Hikkaduwa Beach. Experience thrilling water sports like surfing, kayaking, and paddleboarding under the warm Southern sun, all while enjoying the local culture and friendly atmosphere.

name: Mirissa Whale Watch Tours
description: Mirissa Whale Watch Tours offers a unique opportunity to witness the incredible migration of whales off the coast of Mirissa. This serene spot is perfect for nature lovers and whale enthusiasts, providing a chance to observe these majestic creatures up close without disturbing their natural behavior.
monsoon_note: May–Aug SW monsoon; A2 highway may flood

name: Matara Scuba & Snorkel
description: Matara Scuba & Snorkel offers a unique diving and snorkeling experience off the coast of Matara, Southern Province. This adventure park is perfect for both beginners and experienced divers, featuring crystal-clear waters and vibrant marine life. Visitors can explore underwater caves and reefs, making it a must-visit spot for nature enthusiasts and families alike.

name: Polhena Reef Dive
description: Polhena Reef Dive offers a breathtaking underwater adventure, featuring vibrant coral gardens and a diverse array of marine life. Perfect for divers seeking a unique glimpse into Sri Lanka’s rich marine ecosystem.
monsoon_note: May–Aug SW monsoon; A2 highway may flood

name: Yala Jeep Safari Centre
description: Experience the thrill of Yala Jeep Safari Centre, a unique adventure park in Southern Sri Lanka where visitors can observe wild elephants up close in their natural habitat. Nestled in Hambantota, this site offers a rare opportunity to interact with these majestic creatures under the guidance of experienced guides.
activities: Jeep Safari, Elephant Watching, Nature Walk
wildlife_hazard: None, but visitors should keep a safe distance and avoid sudden movements to prevent startling the animals.

name: Bundala Bird Safari
description: Bundala Bird Safari, a sanctuary for over 100 species of birds, offers a unique glimpse into Sri Lanka’s avian diversity. Nestled in the heart of Hambantota, this protected area is a haven for bird enthusiasts, providing a tranquil setting where nature lovers can observe these feathered wonders in their natural habitat.
monsoon_note: May–Aug SW monsoon; A2 highway may flood

name: Hambantota Port Boat Tours
description: Discover the charm of Hambantota Port Boat Tours, where visitors can embark on serene boat rides through the picturesque waters of the port. Experience the local culture and history while enjoying the beautiful scenery.
activities: Boat Ride, Local Culture Tour, Photography
monsoon_note: May–Aug SW monsoon; A2 highway may flood

name: Jaffna Cycling Trail
description: Experience the Jaffna Cycling Trail, a scenic route through lush greenery and historical sites, offering cyclists a chance to explore the rich cultural heritage of Northern Sri Lanka. This 20-kilometer path winds through ancient temples, vibrant villages, and breathtaking landscapes, making it a must-visit for adventure seekers and history buffs alike.

name: Casuarina Kite Surf
description: Casuarina Kite Surf stands out as a unique adventure park in Jaffna, offering kite surfing lessons and equipment rentals amidst lush greenery and scenic views. Experience the thrill of flying kites over the water while learning from experienced instructors.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Nainativu Boat Adventure
description: Nainativu Boat Adventure offers a unique boat ride experience through the serene waters of Nainativu Island, perfect for adrenaline seekers and nature lovers. Enjoy breathtaking views of the island’s lush greenery and crystal-clear waters while navigating through narrow channels and shallow waters.
activities: Boat Ride, Nature Walk, Bird Watching

name: Iranamadu Water Sports
description: Iranamadu Water Sports is a unique adventure park nestled in the Northern Province, offering thrilling water sports and exciting activities amidst lush greenery and scenic views. Experience kayaking, rafting, and swimming in pristine waters surrounded by nature's beauty.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Kilinochchi Cycling Route
description: Experience the Kilinochchi Cycling Route, a scenic off-road path through lush forests and along rivers, offering cyclists a unique glimpse into Northern Sri Lanka’s post-war landscape and culture. This 15-km route winds through picturesque villages, past waterfalls, and alongside serene lakes, making it a perfect destination for adventure seekers and nature lovers.

name: Elephant Pass Trek
description: Experience the thrill of Elephant Pass Trek, a challenging yet breathtaking adventure through dense jungle trails, where you can witness rare wildlife and marvel at the natural beauty of Northern Sri Lanka.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Mannar Bird Watching Safari
description: Experience the vibrant avian life at Mannar Bird Watching Safari, a sanctuary where over 200 species of birds gather. Nestled in the Northern Province, this eco-friendly park offers a glimpse into Sri Lanka’s diverse wildlife, perfect for bird enthusiasts and nature lovers alike.

name: Adam's Bridge Snorkel
description: Explore the mystical Adam’s Bridge Snorkel, a unique underwater wonderland connecting India and Sri Lanka. This snorkeling paradise offers crystal-clear waters teeming with vibrant marine life, perfect for both beginners and experienced divers. Witness the breathtaking coral reefs and colorful fish schools while learning about its historical significance and natural beauty.

name: Vankalai Flamingo Walk
description: Vankalai Flamingo Walk is a serene wetland park in Mannar, Northern Province, where visitors can observe thousands of flamingos and other waterbirds in their natural habitat. This protected area offers a unique opportunity to learn about local ecosystems and wildlife conservation efforts.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Vavuniya ATV Park
description: Vavuniya ATV Park offers thrilling off-road adventures amidst the lush Northern Province. Experience adrenaline-pumping tracks through scenic landscapes, perfect for both beginners and experienced riders.
activities: ATV Rides, Off-Road Tours, Rally Racing
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Giant Tank Sailing
description: Experience the Giant Tank Sailing, a unique adventure park in Vavuniya. Nestled amidst lush greenery, this site offers thrilling water sports and scenic views. Perfect for adrenaline seekers and nature lovers alike.
activities: Water Sports, Scenic Views, Adrenaline Thrills
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Madhu Forest Trek
description: Madhu Forest Trek offers a unique adventure park nestled in the Northern Province, featuring lush trails, ancient trees, and breathtaking views. Perfect for nature lovers and outdoor enthusiasts, it's a hidden gem where visitors can explore untouched wilderness and learn about local flora and fauna.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Mullaitivu Beach Sports
description: Mullaitivu Beach Sports is a unique adventure park nestled along the picturesque Mullaitivu coastline. Surrounded by lush greenery and vibrant marine life, it offers thrilling water sports and scenic views that captivate visitors. This gem is a testament to the resilience and beauty of Northern Sri Lanka.

name: Nanthikadal Kayaking
description: Nanthikadal Kayaking offers thrilling rapids and stunning views along the Mullaitivu River. Experience the rush of adrenaline as you navigate through the challenging waters, perfect for both beginners and experienced kayakers seeking a memorable adventure.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Mullaitivu Lighthouse Trek
description: Experience the historical significance and breathtaking views of Mullaitivu Lighthouse Trek. Nestled along the coast, this lighthouse offers panoramic vistas and a glimpse into Sri Lanka's maritime past. Perfect for nature lovers and history buffs.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; check roads after rain

name: Pasikuda Kite Surfing
description: Pasikuda Kite Surfing is a unique adventure park in Batticaloa, Eastern Province, offering thrilling kite surfing experiences under the watchful gaze of the Indian Ocean. Surfers can catch waves at this picturesque spot, perfect for both beginners and experienced riders alike.

name: Batticaloa Lagoon Kayak
description: Explore the Batticaloa Lagoon Kayak, a serene adventure park nestled in the Eastern Province. Experience kayaking through crystal-clear waters, surrounded by lush greenery and vibrant birdlife. This tranquil spot offers a perfect escape from the hustle of daily life.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; best season Apr–Sep

name: Vakarai Snorkel Park
description: Vakarai Snorkel Park offers a unique underwater adventure where visitors can explore vibrant coral reefs and colorful marine life in the clear waters of Batticaloa Lake. This park is perfect for snorkeling enthusiasts who want to experience the beauty of Sri Lanka’s natural wonders up close.

name: Ampara Kayak & Canoe
description: Ampara Kayak & Canoe offers thrilling kayak adventures on the serene waters of Ampara River. Experience the thrill of paddling through lush greenery and learn about the local culture and wildlife along the way.

name: Lahugala Elephant Safari
description: Lahugala Elephant Safari is a unique elephant sanctuary located in Ampara District, Eastern Province. Home to over 100 elephants, it offers visitors a chance to interact with these gentle giants in their natural habitat, providing a rare glimpse into the lives of these magnificent creatures.
activities: Elephant Interaction, Guided Tours, Educational Talks

name: Deegawapi Heritage Trek
description: Deegawapi Heritage Trek offers a unique blend of natural beauty and historical significance, featuring ancient ruins, lush forests, and serene waterfalls. This trek is perfect for nature lovers and history buffs, offering a glimpse into Sri Lanka’s rich past while immersing visitors in its breathtaking landscapes.
activities: Explore ancient ruins, Hike through lush forests, Witness waterfalls
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; best season Apr–Sep

name: Trinco Dive & Snorkel Centre
description: Trinco Dive & Snorkel Centre offers a unique diving and snorkeling experience in Trincomalee, Eastern Province. Nestled on the picturesque Trincomalee Beach, it's a haven for underwater enthusiasts, featuring crystal-clear waters and diverse marine life.
monsoon_note: Oct to Jan NE monsoon; best season Apr to Sep

name: Nilaveli Scuba Park
description: Discover the vibrant marine life at Nilaveli Scuba Park, a hidden gem where divers can explore pristine coral reefs and colorful fish amidst the Trincomalee waters. This adventure park offers a unique glimpse into Sri Lanka’s underwater world, perfect for both beginners and experienced divers.
monsoon_note: Oct to Jan NE monsoon; best season Apr to Sep

name: Pigeon Island Glass Bottom
description: Pigeon Island Glass Bottom offers a unique underwater adventure experience, allowing visitors to explore Trincomalee's vibrant marine life through a glass-bottomed boat. This site is perfect for nature enthusiasts and families seeking a memorable outing.

name: Kurunegala Rock Climb
description: Discover the ancient rock formations and hidden caves at Kurunegala Rock Climb, a lesser-known gem in Sri Lanka’s adventure parks. This site offers a glimpse into the island's rich cultural heritage through its well-preserved rock art and historical significance.
activities: Rock climbing, Cave exploration, Cultural tours

name: Ethagala Zipline
description: Ethagala Zipline offers an exhilarating zipline experience high above the jungle canopy, providing breathtaking views and thrilling rides through the lush greenery of Kurunegala.
monsoon_note: May–Sep SW monsoon; Wilpattu closes in heavy rain

name: Kurunegala Cycling Trail
description: Discover the Kurunegala Cycling Trail, a scenic route through lush tea plantations and ancient ruins, offering cyclists a unique glimpse into Sri Lanka’s rich cultural heritage and natural beauty.
activities: Cycling, Tea plantation tour, Historical site visit

name: Kalpitiya Kite Surfing Park
description: Discover the thrill of kite surfing at Kalpitiya Kite Surfing Park, nestled along the picturesque coastline. Experience the perfect blend of adrenaline and breathtaking views, making it a must-visit spot for adventure seekers.

name: Wilpattu Safari Centre
description: Explore the mystical Wilpattu Safari Centre, a unique sanctuary where nature’s wonders unfold amidst ancient ruins and lush landscapes. This expansive park offers a glimpse into Sri Lanka’s rich wildlife and geological history, perfect for adventurous travelers seeking a blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage.
activities: Wildlife Watching, Cultural Tours, Nature Photography

name: Puttalam Lagoon Cruise
description: Experience the serene beauty of Puttalam Lagoon Cruise, a unique adventure park nestled in the lush wetlands of Puttalam. Explore the lagoon’s crystal-clear waters, spot exotic birds, and marvel at the natural wonders of this protected area. Ideal for nature lovers and wildlife enthusiasts.
monsoon_note: May-Sept SW monsoon; Wilpattu closes in heavy rain

name: Anu Heritage Cycling Park
description: Anu Heritage Cycling Park is a unique cycling paradise nestled in the lush Anuradhapura district, offering thrilling rides through scenic trails and historical sites. Experience the thrill of cycling amidst ancient ruins and vibrant nature, making it a must-visit for adventure enthusiasts.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; tank roads may flood

name: Wilpattu North Safari
description: Explore the ancient wilderness of Wilpattu North Safari, a unique park where nature's wonders unfold amidst the ruins of ancient temples. Witness the mesmerizing Wilupattu wetlands, home to diverse wildlife and a haven for bird lovers. Experience the tranquility of this untouched paradise, perfect for nature enthusiasts and adventure seekers alike.

name: Mihintale Rock Climb
description: Discover the ancient ruins and climb the sacred rock at Mihintale, a UNESCO World Heritage site that offers breathtaking views and historical insights into Sri Lanka’s past. This site is a testament to the island’s rich cultural heritage and spiritual significance.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; tank roads may flood

name: Polonnaruwa Boat Safari
description: Experience the serene Polonnaruwa Boat Safari, where ancient ruins meet tranquil waters. Glide through the lush landscapes of Polonnaruwa, past the ruins of temples and monasteries, on a boat ride that offers a unique perspective on this historical gem. Witness the beauty of Polonnaruwa’s natural and cultural heritage all at once.
activities: Boat Ride, Historical Tour, Cultural Exploration

name: Minneriya Elephant Gathering
description: Experience the magic of Minneriya where up to 5,000 elephants gather annually, creating a breathtaking sight that showcases the natural beauty and harmony between humans and nature. This site is a testament to the region's rich wildlife and cultural heritage.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; tank roads may flood

name: Dimbulagala Trek
description: Discover Dimbulagala Trek, a majestic adventure park nestled in Polonnaruwa’s North Central Province. This ancient site offers breathtaking views, challenging hikes, and a rich history dating back centuries. Experience nature at its finest with panoramic vistas and thrilling trails.
monsoon_note: Oct–Jan NE monsoon; tank roads may flood

name: Colombo Laser Tag Arena
description: Experience the adrenaline rush at Colombo Laser Tag Arena, a unique adventure park where friends and family can compete in laser tag battles. Nestled in the bustling heart of Colombo, it offers a thrilling escape from the city’s hustle, perfect for both locals and tourists seeking a fun-filled day out.
activities: Laser Tag Battles, Team Competitions, Escape Rooms

name: Ella Rock Trek Centre
description: Ella Rock Trek Centre stands at the heart of Ella’s natural beauty, offering breathtaking views and challenging trekking routes through lush forests and dramatic rock formations. Perfect for adventure seekers and nature lovers, this park is a must-visit for anyone seeking a memorable experience in the Uva Province.
activities: Rock Climbing, Nature Photography, Bird Watching
monsoon_note: Jul–Sep dry season; Oct–Nov inter-monsoon rains

name: Ravana Falls Zipline
description: Experience the thrill of Ravana Falls Zipline, a breathtaking adventure park nestled amidst lush greenery. Soar through the canopy at Ravana Falls, where nature’s beauty meets adrenaline-pumping excitement. Perfect for both beginners and experienced zippers, this park offers a unique escape into the heart of Sri Lanka’s natural wonders.

name: Namunukula Summit Hike
description: Namunukula Summit Hike offers breathtaking panoramic views of the Uva Province, including the iconic Galoya Waterfall. This challenging yet rewarding hike through lush tea plantations and dense forests rewards visitors with a sense of accomplishment and a lifetime memory.

name: Yala East Safari
description: Experience the thrill of Yala East Safari, a lush jungle park teeming with wildlife. Home to over 130 species, including leopards, elephants, and crocodiles, it’s a paradise for nature lovers and adventure seekers. Explore its dense forests and rivers while keeping a safe distance from the curious animals.
activities: Bird watching, Nature photography, Guided tours
wildlife_hazard: Leopards, elephants, and other animals can be dangerous if provoked. Keep a safe distance and follow park guidelines.

name: Kataragama River Rafting
description: Experience the thrill of Kataragama River Rafting, where adrenaline-pumping rapids and lush jungle scenery combine to create a truly unforgettable adventure. Nestled in the heart of Uva Province, this rafting spot offers a perfect blend of natural beauty and thrilling water sports.

name: Buttala ATV Trail
description: Experience the thrill of riding ATVs through the lush green landscapes of Buttala, where nature's beauty meets adventure. This ATV trail offers a unique glimpse into the Monaragala district, perfect for adrenaline seekers and nature lovers alike.
activities: ATV Riding, Photography, Nature Scavenger Hunt

name: Sinharaja Canopy Walk
description: Experience the lush canopy walk through ancient trees at Sinharaja Canopy Walk, a unique adventure park nestled in the heart of Sri Lanka's last remaining rainforest. Explore the rich biodiversity and historical significance of this protected area, where nature lovers and wildlife enthusiasts can marvel at the diverse flora and fauna.

name: Adam's Peak Night Trek
description: Experience the spiritual journey to Adam’s Peak under the moonlight. This iconic pilgrimage site offers breathtaking views and a profound connection with the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Witness the awe-inspiring sight of pilgrims climbing the peak at night, creating a mesmerizing spectacle against the starry backdrop.

name: Ratnapura River Rafting
description: Experience the Ratnapura River Rafting, a thrilling adventure where adrenaline-pumping rafting trips through the lush Sabaragamuwa province await. Nestled in the heart of nature, this park offers a unique glimpse into Sri Lanka’s natural beauty and cultural heritage.
monsoon_note: May-Sept heavy SW monsoon; Sinharaja always wet

name: Pinnawala Elephant Walk
description: Experience the heartwarming sight of baby elephants at Pinnawala Elephant Walk, a sanctuary where orphaned and abandoned elephants are raised and cared for by local communities. This unique park offers a glimpse into the life of these gentle giants in a natural setting, making it a must-visit for animal lovers and nature enthusiasts.

name: Rambukkana Cycling Trail
description: Experience the thrill of cycling through lush green trails and scenic vistas along the Rambukkana Cycling Trail, a hidden gem in Kegalle. This off-road path winds through diverse landscapes, offering cyclists a chance to explore nature at its best.

name: Kegalle White Water
description: Kegalle White Water Adventure Park offers thrilling white water rafting and kayaking amidst lush greenery and scenic views. Experience the thrill of navigating through rapids and enjoy the natural beauty of this unique park, perfect for adrenaline seekers and nature lovers alike.
activities: White Water Rafting, Kayaking, Nature Walk
